master_style: MASTER STYLE: Vibrant, warm children's book illustration in soft digital painting style. Clean outlines with rich saturated colors. Main character David is a young boy of about 10 years old with olive-tan skin, short curly dark brown hair, bright curious brown eyes, wearing a simple earth-toned tan tunic belted at the waist with a brown leather strap, and sandals. He carries a wooden shepherd's staff and a small brown leather sling pouch at his hip. Setting is ancient Middle Eastern Biblical landscape with golden sandy hills, pale limestone rocks, scattered olive trees, and warm sunny skies in shades of amber, peach, and azure. Background characters wear colorful draped robes of deep blue, red, and ochre. Architecture features low stone walls and simple clay-brick buildings. Art style is joyful, expressive, and child-friendly with rounded shapes and glowing warm light. 16:9 landscape format.
page_prompts: A wide golden hillside under a bright blue sky dotted with fluffy clouds, where young David — a 10-year-old boy with olive-tan skin, short curly dark brown hair, wearing a tan tunic and sandals — stands happily among a flock of fluffy white sheep, gently guiding them with his wooden shepherd's staff. The sheep nuzzle around him as he smiles warmly, one lamb pressing close to his leg. Rolling sandy hills and a single gnarled olive tree stretch behind him in warm amber and green tones. The mood is peaceful, gentle, and pastoral. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — kneels on a grassy hillside bathed in golden morning light, hands clasped together in prayer with eyes closed and a radiant smile on his face, his shepherd's staff resting beside him. His small flock of white sheep graze quietly nearby under a vast blue sky. A warm glowing light surrounds David, suggesting a divine and loving presence. The mood is joyful, reverent, and full of hope. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A massive armored giant named Goliath towers menacingly at the edge of a rocky valley, his enormous frame clad in dull bronze and iron armor with a huge spear planted in the ground beside him. Goliath has a fierce scowling face framed by a dark beard, a bronze helmet, and angry narrowed eyes. Far below him, a crowd of Israelite soldiers in colorful robes and simple armor cower and shrink back in fear, their faces pale and wide-eyed. The sky behind Goliath is dark and stormy, with orange and purple clouds adding to the sense of dread. The mood is dramatic, tense, and intimidating. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Goliath — the enormous armored giant — stands in the middle of a sandy battlefield, mouth wide open in a booming roar, shaking his giant fist and spear in the air. Around the edges of the scene, clusters of strong Israelite soldiers in robes and armor scramble away in every direction, some tripping over each other in panic, faces twisted with fear. Dust clouds swirl at their feet as they flee across the rocky landscape. The contrast between the enormous giant and the fleeing soldiers is dramatic and slightly comic. The mood is chaotic, fearful, and over-the-top. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands at the edge of a hill overlooking the rocky valley, watching Goliath shout in the distance. David's small fists are clenched at his sides, his brow furrowed and jaw set with a look of righteous determination and indignation. Nearby, a group of nervous soldiers peek out from behind boulders, but David stands upright and unafraid in the foreground. The warm golden light falls on David while shadowed soldiers crouch behind him. The mood is bold, resolute, and energized. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands tall in an open sandy clearing, one arm raised confidently toward the sky and his chin lifted with a bright, fearless smile on his face. His eyes shine with determination and joy as he declares his faith. Surrounding soldiers stare at him in amazement, some leaning forward with mouths open in disbelief. Golden rays of warm sunlight beam down on David from above, illuminating him like a small hero. The mood is courageous, faithful, and uplifting. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Inside a grand stone tent-palace draped in rich red and purple fabrics, a tall regal king with a dark beard, golden crown, and flowing crimson robes sits on a carved stone throne, leaning forward with a raised eyebrow and a concerned but curious expression as he looks down at small young David standing before him. David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — looks up at the king with calm, steady eyes and a confident smile, his shepherd's staff in hand. Royal guards and advisors stand to the sides, exchanging skeptical glances. The mood is tense but hopeful, with warm candlelight flickering across the stone walls. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — crouches beside a sparkling shallow river winding through smooth pale stones, carefully selecting small round stones from the riverbed and examining each one with focused concentration. His shepherd's staff leans against a nearby rock, and his leather sling pouch is open on his knee. Four smooth stones already sit in his palm, and he reaches for a fifth. Soft blue water reflects the golden afternoon light, and green reeds sway gently at the river's edge. The mood is calm, purposeful, and quietly determined. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

On a wide open sandy battlefield, enormous Goliath in full bronze armor looms in the left background, bent forward with a mocking open-mouthed laugh and pointing finger. In the foreground, young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands his ground with feet planted firmly apart, his leather sling raised high above his head, chin lifted with fierce and fearless confidence. His eyes are locked on Goliath without a trace of fear. Behind David, a line of wide-eyed soldiers watches in stunned silence. The mood is dramatic, brave, and electrifying. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

Young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands in the center of the sandy battlefield with eyes gently closed and hands cupped around his leather sling, a single smooth stone nestled inside it. His face is calm and peaceful, glowing with a soft golden warm light from above that suggests God's presence surrounding him. His lips are slightly parted in quiet prayer. The vast sky above is clear and bright blue with rays of light breaking through. The mood is serene, spiritual, and deeply hopeful. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A dramatic action scene showing the smooth stone arcing through the bright blue sky in a curved motion-trail line, straight toward giant Goliath whose bronze helmet cracks on impact, his enormous body beginning to topple backward with arms flailing and a look of shock on his face. In the left foreground, young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands with his sling outstretched, eyes wide and expression fierce. A massive dust cloud erupts as Goliath crashes toward the ground. Rays of golden sunlight burst dramatically across the scene. The mood is triumphant, explosive, and awe-inspiring. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.

A joyful celebratory scene where young David — olive-tan skin, curly dark brown hair, tan tunic, sandals — stands at the center of a cheering crowd of Israelite soldiers and townspeople in colorful robes of red, blue, and yellow, all with arms raised, huge smiles, and expressions of pure delight. Some toss their hats in the air, others lift children onto their shoulders. The king in his golden crown smiles proudly in the background. David beams with a humble, radiant smile, one hand raised in the air and the other holding his shepherd's staff. The sky blazes with warm golden sunset colors of orange, pink, and gold. The mood is joyful, triumphant, and heartwarming. Children's book illustration, 16:9 landscape.
